browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT transcript exporter. It reuses the authenticated browser session, opens a conversation route, and extracts the visible DOM transcript.

sequences.description: Open thread -> extract visible turns -> return structured transcript.
sequences.name: chatgpt_export_chat

steps.name: Open the target ChatGPT conversation in the current tab
Give the thread shell another moment
Wait for the ChatGPT thread surface
Extract the visible transcript
steps.script: const cleanArg = (value) => { const text = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text) ? '' : text; }; const expectedChatId = cleanArg(arg0); const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const chatIdFromLocation = () => { const match = window.location.pathname.match(/^\/c\/([^/?#]+)/); return match ? match[1] : null; }; const stripNoise = (node) => { const clone = node.cloneNode(true); clone.querySelectorAll('button, nav, form, textarea, input, svg, style, script').forEach((child) => child.remove()); return normalize(clone.textContent || ''); }; const linksFrom = (node) => Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('a[href]')).map((link) => { const href = link.getAttribute('href') || link.href || ''; const text = normalize(link.textContent || ''); if (!href) return null; try { return { href: new URL(href, window.location.origin).toString(), text }; } catch { return { href, text }; } }).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 25); const turns = []; const raw = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[data-message-author-role], main article, [data-testid*='conversation-turn'], [data-testid*='conversationTurn']")); const seen = new Set(); for (const node of raw) { const root = node.closest('[data-message-author-role]') || node; if (seen.has(root)) continue; seen.add(root); const explicitRole = (root.getAttribute('data-message-author-role') || '').toLowerCase(); const testId = (root.getAttribute('data-testid') || '').toLowerCase(); const role = explicitRole || (/assistant|model/.test(testId) ? 'assistant' : /user|prompt/.test(testId) ? 'user' : 'unknown'); const codeBlocks = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('pre, code')).map((block) => normalize(block.textContent || '')).filter(Boolean); const markdownText = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.markdown, [data-message-content], [data-testid*="markdown"], pre, code, p, li')).map((child) => normalize(child.textContent || '')).filter(Boolean); const text = normalize(markdownText.join('\n\n')) || stripNoise(root); if (!text) continue; turns.push({ index: turns.length, role, text, code_blocks: codeBlocks, links: linksFrom(root), test_id: root.getAttribute('data-testid') || null }); } const currentChatId = chatIdFromLocation(); if (expectedChatId && currentChatId && currentChatId !== expectedChatId) throw new Error(`expected chat_id ${expectedChatId} but opened ${currentChatId}`); return { url: window.location.href, title: document.title, chat_id: currentChatId, message_count: turns.length, assistant_turn_count: turns.filter((turn) => turn.role === 'assistant').length, user_turn_count: turns.filter((turn) => turn.role === 'user').length, transcript: turns };

description: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation by chat id and export the visible transcript as structured role/content turns.

help.summary: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation by chat id and export the visible transcript as structured role/content turns.

name: ChatGPT: Export Visible Chat
